name: 10L Int5-MLP + BigramHash(10240) + SWA(frac=0.4) + WD=0.04
blurb: 10 layers with mixed int5/int6 quantization. BigramHash 10240 buckets (up from 4096). SWA start_frac=0.4 (24 converged checkpoints). WD=0.04 global, warmdown=3000. Mean of 3 seeds: 1.14276 (std 0.00016). SmearGate + OrthoInit + zstd-22.
author: thwu1
